system_prompt: You are an OpenFOAM debugging planner. Given current foam files, error logs and reviewer analysis, create a minimal rewrite plan. Output MUST be strict JSON only, with this exact schema: {"target_files": [{"file": "relative/path", "changes": "change1; change2"}]}. Rules: 1) Do not use markdown, backticks, or comments. 2) Use double quotes for all strings. 3) In changes, use short plain text actions separated by semicolons. 4) Do not include parentheses, backticks, or quote characters inside changes text. 5) Do not include run steps; only file edits.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     pimpleFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.3;

deltaT          0.0001;

writeControl    runTime;

writeInterval   0.01;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         cellLimited Gauss linear 1;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div(phi,k)      Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,epsilon) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,omega)  Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,nuTilda) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

wallDist
{
    method          meshWave;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
    }

    "(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.1;
    }

    "(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)Final"
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors    1;
    nCorrectors         2;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
    pRefCell            0;
    pRefValue           0;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      blockMeshDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   0.001;

vertices
(
    (-20.6 0 -0.5)        // 0
    (-20.6 25.4 -0.5)     // 1
    (0 -25.4 -0.5)        // 2
    (0 0 -0.5)            // 3
    (0 25.4 -0.5)         // 4
    (206 -25.4 -0.5)      // 5
    (206 0 -0.5)          // 6
    (206 25.4 -0.5)       // 7
    (-20.6 0 0.5)         // 8
    (-20.6 25.4 0.5)      // 9
    (0 -25.4 0.5)         // 10
    (0 0 0.5)             // 11
    (0 25.4 0.5)          // 12
    (206 -25.4 0.5)       // 13
    (206 0 0.5)           // 14
    (206 25.4 0.5)        // 15
);

blocks
(
    hex (0 3 4 1 8 11 12 9) (18 30 1) simpleGrading (0.5 1 1)
    hex (2 5 6 3 10 13 14 11) (180 18 1) simpleGrading (4 0.4 1)
    hex (3 6 7 4 11 14 15 12) (180 30 1) simpleGrading (4 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 1 9 8)
        );
    }
    outlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (5 13 14 6)
            (6 14 15 7)
        );
    }
    upperWall
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (1 4 12 9)
            (4 7 15 12)
        );
    }
    lowerWall
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (0 8 11 3)
            (3 11 10 2)
            (2 10 13 5)
        );
    }
    frontAndBack
    {
        type empty;
        faces
        (
            (0 3 4 1)
            (2 5 6 3)
            (3 6 7 4)
            (8 9 12 11)
            (10 11 14 13)
            (11 12 15 14)
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";

}

transportModel  Newtonian;

nu              1e-04;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='nut', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            calculated;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            calculated;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    upperWall
    {
        type            nutkWallFunction;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    lowerWall
    {
        type            nutkWallFunction;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    frontAndBack
    {

    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='nuTilda', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile

<error_logs>[{'file': 'log.pimpleFoam', 'error_content': 'ERROR: 
keyword omegaFinal is undefined in dictionary "/pscratch/sd/p/peijingx/troubleshoot/benchmark_grouping_C_Cmodels/runs/pitzDaily/3/system/fvSolution/solvers"

file: /pscratch/sd/p/peijingx/troubleshoot/benchmark_grouping_C_Cmodels/runs/pitzDaily/3/system/fvSolution/solvers from line 14 to line 37.

    From function const Foam::dictionary& Foam::dictionary::subDict(const Foam::word&) const
    in file db/dictionary/dictionary.C at line 1008.

FOAM exiting'}]</error_logs>
<review_analysis># Error Diagnosis and Resolution

## Error Analysis

The error is:

```
keyword omegaFinal is undefined in dictionary ".../system/fvSolution/solvers"
```

The `fvSolution` file references solver entries for `omegaFinal`, but these entries don't exist in the current configuration. Looking at the current `fvSolution`:

```
"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"
{
    ...
}

"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)Final"
{
    $U;
    relTol          0;
}
```

The regex pattern `(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)` does NOT include `omega`, so `omegaFinal` cannot be resolved. Additionally, the `omegaFinal` entry would need its own solver configuration.

## Proposed Fix

**Modify `system/fvSolution`** to include `omega` in the solver patterns and add the corresponding `omegaFinal` entry.

Specifically, update the solver block to include `omega` in the regex patterns:

```
"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda|omega)"
{
    solver          smoothSolver;
    smoother        symGaussSeidel;
    tolerance       1e-06;
    relTol          0.1;
}

"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda|omega)Final"
{
    $U;
    relTol          0;
}
```

Also, add a dedicated solver entry for `omega` (in addition to the combined pattern):

```
omega
{
    solver          smoothSolver;
    smoother        symGaussSeidel;
    tolerance       1e-06;
    relTol          0.1;
}

omegaFinal
{
    $omega;
    relTol          0;
}
```

The key change is expanding the regex pattern from `(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)` to `(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda|omega)` so that `omegaFinal` can be resolved, and adding the individual `omega` and `omegaFinal` solver blocks.

## Summary

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `system/fvSolution` | Expand regex patterns to include `omega`: change `(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)` to `(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda|omega)` and add individual `omega` and `omegaFinal` solver sub-dictionaries |</review_analysis>
<user_requirement>do a Reynolds-Averaged Simulation (RAS) pitzdaily simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm. The domain is a 2D millimeter-scale channel geometry. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 15m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls. Use timestep of 0.0001 and output every 0.01. Finaltime is 0.3. use nu value of 1e-04.</user_requirement>
Return strict JSON now with key target_files only.
response: target_files=[PlannedFileChange(file='system/fvSolution', changes='Expand regex pattern from (U|k|epsilon|nuTilda) to (U|k|epsilon|nuTilda|omega) in both the combined solver block and the Final solver block; Add individual omega solver block with solver smoothSolver, smoother symGaussSeidel, tolerance 1e-06, relTol 0.1; Add individual omegaFinal solver block referencing $omega with relTol 0')]
